inputs.label: Home Win Probability
inputs.businessContext: Estimated probability of home team winning, as percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated probability of home team winning, as percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ev sahibi takımın kazanma olasılığı tahmini, yüzde olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Wahrscheinlichkeit eines Heimsiegs in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité estimée de victoire de l'équipe à domicile, en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad estimada de que el equipo local gane, en porcentaje.

inputs.label: Draw Probability
inputs.businessContext: Estimated probability of a draw, as percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated probability of a draw, as percentage.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Wahrscheinlichkeit eines Unentschiedens in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité estimée d'un match nul, en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad estimada de empate, en porcentaje.

inputs.label: Away Win Probability
inputs.businessContext: Estimated probability of away team winning, as percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated probability of away team winning, as percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deplasman takımının kazanma olasılığı tahmini, yüzde olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Wahrscheinlichkeit eines Auswärtssiegs in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité estimée de victoire de l'équipe à l'extérieur, en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad estimada de que el equipo visitante gane, en porcentaje.

inputs.label: Margin (Overround)
inputs.businessContext: Bookmaker margin as percentage over fair odds (e.g., 5% overround).

businessContext_i18n.en: Bookmaker margin as percentage over fair odds (e.g., 5% overround).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bahis şirketinin adil oranlar üzerindeki yüzde marjı (ör. %5 overround).
businessContext_i18n.de: Buchmachermarge in Prozent über fairen Quoten (z. B. 5 % Overround).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge du bookmaker en pourcentage au-dessus des cotes équitables (ex. : 5 % de surestimation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de la casa de apuestas como porcentaje sobre las probabilidades justas (ej. 5% de overround).
